productDisplayName: Skechers Women Silver & Pink Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteWith a sleek and sporty look, this shoe from skechers comes with a generously padded, moisture-wicking mesh lining that keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The low profile midsole and flexible traction outsole makes this a great reason to buy.
